text:
is the 7th chapter of the 1st volume and the 7th chapter overall of the Spoof on Titan manga, written and illustrated by hounori.

Overview

 Oluo lies motionless on the floor with blood coming out from the back of his head. The Special Operations Squad investigates the scene. 

Summary

Levi looks at Oluo, who is lying motionless on the floor and bleeding from the back of the head. Eren concludes that someone must have attacked him from behind, and it could not have been him since he has been with Levi all day. He looks at the rest of the squad; Eld, Gunther, and Petra.

Shocked, the three of them protest that even though Oluo pissed them off in multiple ways they would never do such a thing. Gunther confirms that he was the one who found the body when he called Oluo for dinner. He was very shocked and when he came to his senses he took back the money that Oluo owed him.

Eld tells Eren to not suspect his squadmates. After all, Oluo helped them kill a lot of Titans. Besides, if they were going to kill him it would be more convenient to make it look like an accident outside the Walls.

Seeing that Petra is acting nervous, Eren asks her why her voice is shaking. Petra reveals that she has been making hot pot for dinner again, to the dismay of the rest of the squad, which has been eating it for a while now.

Levi notes that Oluo has fallen on his back and there is a banana peel on the floor with a footprint on it. It is unfortunate, but some people go out that way. Eld, Gunther, and Petra express dismay, especially for not being nicer to him, but Oluo soon gets up and says he forgives them.

As the rest of the squad beats him up, Oluo protests that he was not sure when it was okay to get up. Levi asks them why they are not grateful Oluo is actually alive. The squad leaves Oluo alone and he apologizes for worrying them.

Not done, Levi tells Eren he will have to be punished for suspecting his comrades. Eren is placed in charge of caring for Oluo until his wounds heal.
